name: Southern Packaging Group Limited
summary: Southern Packaging Group Limited, an investment holding company, produces and trades in flexible and rigid packaging products in the People's Republic of China, Europe, the United States, Australia, and internationally. Its Flexible Packaging segment manufactures plastic packaging bags with design supplied by the customers for the pharmaceutical, food and beverage, and hygiene industries. The company's Rigid Packaging segment manufactures polythylene terephthalate bottles, as well as prints design onto the bottles for the pharmaceutical, food and beverage, and hygiene industries. Its Property Development segment develops properties for future sale. The company also engages in the sub-contract processing business. Southern Packaging Group Limited was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Foshan, the People's Republic of China.
